hero.title: Don't trust AI blindly.
hero.description: KLAR checks every claim in AI-generated text against real sources — automatically, transparently, and in seconds.

howItWorks.title: How KLAR Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From AI text to verified report in five steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Paste any AI-generated text — reports, emails, or articles.
howItWorks.step2Desc: KLAR automatically identifies every factual claim in the text.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Each claim is checked against Wikipedia and the open web.
howItWorks.step4Desc: A second AI pass evaluates each claim against the evidence.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Color-coded report with source links for every single claim.

features.title: Why KLAR?
features.evidenceBasedDesc: Checks against real sources — not AI vs AI.
features.transparentDesc: Every verdict with reasoning and source links.
features.euCompliantDesc: Data in Frankfurt. GDPR by design.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade as you grow.

verify.title: Verify Text
verify.quotaWarning: You have {remaining} verifications left this month.
verify.quotaExceeded: Monthly limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for more verifications.
verify.textTooShort: Text is too short. At least 50 characters required.
verify.textTooLong: Text is too long. Maximum 10,000 characters allowed.
verify.emptyText: Please enter a text to verify.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noVerifications: No verifications yet. Start your first check!

history.title: History
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this verification?

auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.signupError: Sign up failed. Please try again.
auth.signupSuccess: Sign up successful! Please verify your email.
auth.logoutSuccess: You have been logged out successfully.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.serverError: Server error. Our team has been notified.
errors.notFound: The page you're looking for was not found.
errors.aiError: The AI service is temporarily unavailable.

settings.title: Settings
settings.dataExportDesc: Download all your data as a JSON file (GDPR Art. 20).
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone (GDPR Art. 17).
settings.deleteConfirm: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion:

benchmark.title: Benchmark Leaderboard
benchmark.subtitle: See how AI models perform on KLAR's standardized fact-checking exam. Register your agent and compete.
benchmark.examDescription: 12 questions testing factual accuracy, adversarial resilience, safety alignment, and reasoning. Your agent's answers are verified through KLAR's own pipeline.
benchmark.noEntries: No agents on the leaderboard yet.
benchmark.beFirst: Be the first to take the exam!
benchmark.quickStartDesc: Register your AI agent, take the exam, and get scored — all via API. No account needed.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.name: Key name
apiKeys.saveWarning: Save this key securely. It will not be shown again.
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one for API access or the browser extension.
apiKeys.requiresPro: API keys are available on Pro plans and above.
apiKeys.maxKeys: Maximum of 10 active API keys per account.

org.title: Organization
org.noOrg: You are not a member of an organization.
org.requiresTeamPlan: Organization creation requires a Team or Enterprise plan.
org.alreadyMember: Already a member of an organization.

compliance.title: Compliance Reports
compliance.noReports: No reports yet. Generate your first compliance report.
compliance.description: Generate EU AI Act compliance reports, monthly summaries, and audit trail exports.

batch.title: Batch Verification
batch.description: Submit multiple texts for verification via API.

landing.title: Enterprise AI Quality
landing.subtitle: Verify AI outputs at scale. EU AI Act compliant.
landing.feature1Desc: Integrate verification into your workflow with our API or Chrome Extension.
landing.feature2Desc: Manage teams, share verification history, and track usage across your organization.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate EU AI Act transparency reports, risk assessments, and audit trails automatically.
landing.feature4Desc: Verify hundreds of texts programmatically with our batch API.
